description: ORD Terminal 3 — United-heavy terminal with reliable food options.

vendors.name: Tortas Frontera
vendors.opinion: Rick Bayless at the airport. Seriously good tortas — get there before the rush.

vendors.name: Wicker Park Sushi
vendors.opinion: Surprisingly good for ORD. Give yourself 25 min if you're doing sit-down.

tips: Tortas Frontera is the best quick meal in T3. If you have time, Wicker Park Sushi is a step above typical airport sushi.
